final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a young woman leaning against a neon sign on a 1990s Hong Kong street, in vintage film style.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography, expired Kodak Gold or Fuji 400H emulation, in the spirit of Wong Kar-wai's Chungking Express and Fallen Angels — warm-toned, grainy, nostalgic
Composition: medium shot, slight low-angle, 50mm prime lens, shallow depth of field with soft bokeh on background neon signs
Subject: young woman in a denim jacket, leaning casually against a glowing neon sign, relaxed and introspective expression, hair slightly disheveled
Scene/backdrop: 1990s Hong Kong street at night — dense overhead signage in Chinese characters, wet pavement reflecting neon, narrow alley or bustling sidewalk
Lighting/mood: warm amber and red neon glow as key light, soft haze and atmospheric fog, moody and melancholic, deeply nostalgic
Color palette: warm amber and orange as dominant tones, deep shadow blacks, occasional pink/red neon accent — no cool blue dominance
Materials/textures: visible film grain throughout, slight halation around neon light sources, subtle lens softness, denim jacket texture
Avoid: digital sharpness, clean HDR look, modern smartphone aesthetic, overexposed highlights, cold blue color grading, watermark
